commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e3bb7eae11f3177d27192c1422b2329bbd53fa85)
commands.review_summary:
The branch edits generated Arabic Control UI locale output and Arabic translation memory entries to replace several English UI strings with Arabic copy.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blocker: source inspection shows the Arabic glossary pins `Skills -> Skills`, while the PR changes generated `Skills` entries to Arabic without changing the glossary. I did not run UI checks because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and a maintainer terminology decision for the Arabic `Skills` glossary, so it is not a safe automated repair candidate.

target.title: fix(ui): improve Arabic Control UI translations
target.body:
Summary:
- Improve Arabic translations for Control UI chat welcome text and run controls.
- Translate remaining visible English labels such as Skills, Browser enabled, Tool profile, and scheduled-job empty states.
- Update the Arabic translation memory entries that back the generated locale output.

Validation:
- Parsed ui/src/i18n/locales/ar.ts with Node after stripping the TS-only import/type annotation.
- Parsed every line in ui/src/i18n/.i18n/ar.tm.jsonl as JSONL; 1060 entries validated.
- Compared branch against upstream main: 2 files changed.

Real behavior proof:
- Draft PR: full local Control UI build was not run because cloning the full repository on this Windows environment repeatedly timed out. The changed strings correspond to visible Control UI text observed in the running local dashboard/chat screen.

AI-assisted:
- This PR was prepared with Codex assistance and manually scoped to Arabic UI copy corrections.
target.author: aim9sour

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
